Math.tex: a\Ydown b\quad a\Yleft b\quad a\Yright b\quad a\Yup b
Math.text: fragments@(a Ydown b, a Yleft b, a Yright b, a Yup b)

Math.tex: a\baro b\quad a\bbslash b\quad a\binampersand b\quad a\bindnasrepma b
Math.text: fragments@(a apl-reversal b, a bbslash b, a additive-conjunction b, a multiplicative-disjunction b)

Math.tex: a\boxast b\quad a\boxbar b\quad a\boxbox b\quad a\boxbslash b\quad a\boxcircle b\quad a\boxdot b\quad a\boxempty b\quad a\boxslash b
Math.text: fragments@(boxast@(a, b), a boxbar b, boxbox@(a, b), boxbslash@(a, b), boxcircle@(a, b), a boxdot b, a boxempty b, boxslash@(a, b))

Math.tex: a\curlyveedownarrow b\quad a\curlyveeuparrow b\quad a\curlywedgedownarrow b\quad a\curlywedgeuparrow b
Math.text: fragments@(a curlyveedownarrow b, a curlyveeuparrow b, a curlywedgedownarrow b, a curlywedgeuparrow b)

Math.tex: a\fatbslash b\quad a\fatsemi b\quad a\fatslash b\quad a\interleave b
Math.text: fragments@(a fatbslash b, a fatsemi b, a fatslash b, a interleave b)

Math.tex: a\leftslice b\quad a\merge b\quad a\minuso b\quad a\moo b\quad a\nplus b
Math.text: fragments@(a leftslice b, a merge b, a minuso b, a * moo * b, a intersection-plus b)

Math.tex: a\obar b\quad a\oblong b\quad a\obslash b\quad a\ogreaterthan b\quad a\olessthan b\quad a\ovee b\quad a\owedge b
Math.text: formulae@(a obar b, a oblong b, a obslash b, a ogreaterthan b, a olessthan b, a ovee b, a owedge b)

Math.tex: a\rightslice b\quad a\sslash b\quad a\talloblong b\quad a\varbigcirc b\quad a\varcurlyvee b\quad a\varcurlywedge b
Math.text: fragments@(a rightslice b, a sslash b, a talloblong b, a varbigcirc b, a varcurlyvee b, a varcurlywedge b)

Math.tex: a\varoast b\quad a\varobar b\quad a\varobslash b\quad a\varocircle b\quad a\varodot b\quad a\varogreaterthan b\quad a\varolessthan b
Math.text: fragments@(a varoast b, a varobar b, a varobslash b, a varocircle b, a varodot b, a varogreaterthan b, a varolessthan b)

Math.tex: a\varominus b\quad a\varoplus b\quad a\varoslash b\quad a\varotimes b\quad a\varovee b\quad a\varowedge b\quad a\vartimes b
Math.text: fragments@(a varominus b, a additive-disjunction b, a varoslash b, a multiplicative-conjunction b, a varovee b, a varowedge b, a vartimes b)
fragments@(bigbox, bigcurlywedge, bigcurlyvee, biginterleave, intersection-plus, bigparallel, bigsqcap, bigtriangledown, bigtriangleup)
fragments@(bigbox, bigcurlywedge, bigcurlyvee, biginterleave, intersection-plus, bigparallel, bigsqcap, bigtriangledown, bigtriangleup)
fragments@(intersection-plus, intersection-plus, intersection-plus, intersection-plus)
fragments@(inplus, niplus, ntrianglelefteqslant, ntrianglerighteqslant, trianglelefteqslant, trianglerighteqslant)

Math.tex: a\subsetplus b\quad a\subsetpluseq b\quad a\supsetplus b\quad a\supsetpluseq b
Math.text: fragments@(a subset-plus b, a subset-equals-plus b, a superset-plus b, a superset-equals-plus b)

Math.tex: a\mapsfromchar b\quad a\mapsfrom b\quad a\Mapsfromchar b\quad a\Mapsfrom b\quad a\longmapsfrom b\quad a\Longmapsfrom b\quad
Math.text: fragments@(a mapsfromchar b, a mapsfrom b, a Mapsfromchar b, a Mapsfrom b, a longmapsfrom b, a Longmapsfrom b)

Math.tex: a\Mapstochar b\quad a\Mapsto b\quad a\Longmapsto b\quad
Math.text: formulae@(a Mapstochar b, a Mapsto b, a Longmapsto b)

Math.tex: a\nnearrow b\quad a\nnwarrow b\quad a\ssearrow b\quad a\sswarrow b
Math.text: fragments@(a nnearrow b, a nnwarrow b, a ssearrow b, a sswarrow b)

Math.tex: a\leftarrowtriangle b\quad a\rightarrowtriangle b\quad a\leftrightarrowtriangle b\quad a\leftrightarroweq b\quad a\lightning b
Math.text: formulae@(a leftarrowtriangle b, a rightarrowtriangle b, a leftrightarrowtriangle b, a leftrightarroweq b, a lightning b)

Math.tex: a\shortdownarrow b\quad a\shortleftarrow b\quad a\shortrightarrow b\quad a\shortuparrow b
Math.text: fragments@(a shortdownarrow b, a shortleftarrow b, a shortrightarrow b, a shortuparrow b)

Math.tex: a\arrownot b\quad a\longarrownot b\quad a\Arrownot b\quad a\Longarrownot b
Math.text: fragments@(a arrownot b, a longarrownot b, a Arrownot b, a Longarrownot b)
fragments@(delimited-⟅⟆@(42), delimited-⟅⟆@(42))
fragments@(delimited-⟦⟧@(42), delimited-⌊⌊⌋⌋@(42), delimited-⌈⌈⌉⌉@(42), delimited-⦇⦈@(42))
